query: UPDATE participants SET livesRemaining = 4 WHERE id = 60011 AND livesRemaining < 4; UPDATE payment_events SET status = 'waived', reason = CONCAT(reason, ' — Life restored: technical upload failure. Waived by admin.'), confirmedAt = NOW() WHERE id = 30001 AND participantId = 60011; SELECT p.id AS participantId, p.displayName, p.livesRemaining, pe.id AS paymentEventId, pe.status, pe.reason, pe.confirmedAt FROM participants p LEFT JOIN payment_events pe ON pe.participantId = p.id AND pe.id = 30001 WHERE p.id = 60011;

Waived by admin.'), confirmedAt = NOW() WHERE id = 30001 AND participantId = 60011; SELECT p.id AS participantId, p.displayName, p.livesRemaining, pe.id AS paymentEventId, pe.status, pe.reason, pe.confirmedAt FROM participants p LEFT JOIN payment_events pe ON pe.participantId = p.id AND pe.id = 30001 WHERE p.id = 60011;

rows.reason: Deadline passed for day 2. Missed rule(s): No Alcohol, Clean Eating, 30m Exercise, Daily Reflection, Read & Teach, Track Everything — Life restored: technical upload failure. Waived by admin.
